failedPrompts.query: does face oil actually work for oily skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Yes, lightweight oils like The Ordinary Squalane or jojoba oil can work for oily skin by balancing natural sebum production. Use minimal amounts on problem areas and avoid heavy oils; the key is proper facial cleansing beforehand.

failedPrompts.query: do sheet masks actually improve skin or just marketing
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Sheet masks genuinely improve skin temporarily through hydration and ingredient delivery, though results fade within hours to days. They're excellent for events and boosting hydration, but aren't replacements for consistent daily skincare routines.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Many sheet masks provide a temporary glow but can effectively hydrate and deliver active ingredients deeper into the skin, enhancing overall skin health with regular use.
